message:
🐛 Disable aw noop/detection tracking issues (#10777)

Add noop: false to all 3 agentic workflow sources to prevent
auto-creation of [aw] No-Op Runs and [aw] Detection Runs issues.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
